title: bauhinia bidentata var. gracilipes
intro: Bauhinia bidentata var. gracilipes, also known as the yellow orchid tree, is a plant species belonging to the family Fabaceae. Traditionally, this plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Bauhinia bidentata var. gracilipes are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are typically used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are administered orally to harness its medicinal properties.
